題幹: According to the notes, what do birds do if their babies have the smell of people on them?
選項: (A) They keep taking care of them. (B) They push them out of the nest. (C) They clean them until the smell goes away. (D) They leave them behind and move to a new nest.

題幹: Which is true about Marie Colvin?

(C) She was killed in Homs when she was interviewing soldiers there for her report. (D) She was not sure what to do in the future until she worked for the Sunday Times.
